frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Seriously guys, watching all these divorce cases and huge alimony payouts, it feels like men are just walking ATMs these days. Better be smart and get a prenup, otherwise you spend your life building something just for some 'stability seeker' to walk away with half of it. Protect your assets.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment frames women as financially exploitative in marriage, viewing them as 'stability seekers' who are primarily interested in men's wealth ('walking ATMs') and exploit divorce for financial gain (alimony payouts), thereby aligning with the 'women as golddiggers' and 'prenup as protection' aspects of the frame. It expresses concern for men's financial vulnerability in marriage and divorce.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 34. A sales manager in Chennai. You are texting your male college friends group on WhatsApp after your company announced paid period leave for female employees. You are commenting on whether period leave is fair to male colleagues.
